text: The path disappears, replaced by a wall of weeping ice and stone.
Kale becomes an insect on its face, her muscles screaming.
For Skyrith, the ascent is a battle against his own limbs, each motion a draining of what little warmth remains.
They are no longer flying, they are crawling toward a hope that may be nothing more than a story.
The peak above remains hidden, shrouded in the storm's heart.
